On last week's show,
So we had Monty come on and tell us about two encounters he had, but unfortunately we
ran out of time and I wasn't able to ask him any questions.

Okay.
The first encounter, I was 16.
It was me, my brother, and a friend, John, and we lived out in rural Virginia, southwest Virginia, Giles County to be specific.
Behind our house was some woods.
We decided to go camping.
We were up there.
It was nighttime.
I'd gone back to get some firewood, and I had something thrown by my head into the fire.
and I paused a minute and I had something else fly by my head and we realized it wasn't like an
acorn or anything it looked like a rock and a couple seconds later we had a about an 8 to 10
second scream that scared the living daylights out of all three of us and I basically grabbed
to my little brother and went straight down the mountain, went through a fence, basically
tore his leg up, got down to the house, met John down there, which took an alternate route,
banged on the door, got inside.
After a little bit, my dad said, hey, let's go back up there and put the fire back out.
I didn't want to go, but reluctantly, I went ahead and got in the truck.
There was an access road that kind of paralleled my way down, so we went up that access road.
And while he got out of the truck and he put out the fire, I basically sat in the truck and bit my fingernails and shivered, hoping that he wasn't going to get attacked, which he didn't.
And he got back in the truck.
We went back down.
And I basically, from then on out, I had some trouble with some PTSD for quite a while after that.
And that's the first encounter.
The second encounter was out in Menida, Virginia, a place called Snug Harbor.
I went out to pick my brother up from a friend's house later one evening.
I'm thinking it was around 10 or 10.30, maybe 11 o'clock.
Went out, heard something on my way out, really didn't think anything of it.
Picked him up, turned around, came back.
And while I was reaching down to grab a CD or pack a cigarette, I can't remember what it was.
I was reaching down for, but my brother started saying,
look, look, look, look.
And I looked up and I seen the back half of this creature
passing in front of us.

And we waited until it basically got about four or five steps into the woods there And then I gunned it back to the house Went in My dad wasn awake this time so we basically stayed up all night talking about it
And that's pretty much both of the encounters.
